data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified decision-making processes aid faster user interactions with navigation and purchasing.
data.technical_spec: Easy navigation structure and concise process flows.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The site's design considers size and positioning of interactive elements for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Large buttons and accessible UI elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A clean, visually appealing design enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality images, smooth animations, and coherent typography.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Visual hierarchy and grouping elements are used to guide user perception.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of proximity, similarity, and continuation.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is chunked into manageable parts to aid cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Content is broken into digestible pieces with headers and sub-sections.
